component.name: Null IDE
component.summary: The Ultimate Hacker's Code Editor & Security Toolkit

description.p: Null IDE is a professional-grade code editor and security toolkit designed for ethical hackers, security researchers, and developers. It combines the power of Monaco Editor with over 60 integrated security testing tools.
Key Features:

ul.li: Monaco Code Editor with syntax highlighting for 50+ languages
Built-in terminal with PTY support (node-pty)
SQL Injection Scanner (SQLi, Blind SQLi, Time-based)
XSS Scanner (Reflected, Stored, DOM-based)
JWT Token Analyzer and Decoder
GraphQL Security Scanner
LDAP & XPath Injection Testing
NoSQL Injection Scanner
Race Condition Detector
Cache Poisoning Testing
DNS Rebinding Attack Tool
API Rate Limit Testing
Request Interceptor & Repeater
Encoding/Decoding Tools (Base64, URL, Hex, etc.)
Hash Generator (MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA512)
Network Tools (Port Scanner, DNS Lookup, WHOIS)
Serial/USB Device Monitor

description.p: All tools operate locally with no external data transmission, ensuring complete privacy for your security research.

screenshot.caption: Main editor interface with security toolkit

description.p: Terminal fix - rebuild node-pty with node-gyp.

ul.li: Use node-gyp with Electron headers instead of @electron/rebuild
Download Electron headers directly for reliable native module compilation
Verified pty.node binary is correctly built for Electron ABI

description.p: Fixed package-lock.json sync issue.

ul.li: Regenerated package-lock.json for npm ci compatibility
Terminal fix with @electron/rebuild in CI
VSCode-like save behavior

description.p: Terminal fix and VSCode-like save behavior.

ul.li: Rebuild node-pty with @electron/rebuild in CI before Flatpak build
Added unsaved file close confirmation dialogs
Added Save As support for untitled files
Fixed modified indicator (‚óè) clearing after save

description.p: Fixed JSON syntax error.
Fixed JSON syntax error in manifest.

ul.li: Fixed sha256 format in manifest
Terminal rebuilt with node-gyp

description.p: Terminal FIXED - native node-pty rebuilt inside Flatpak!

ul.li: Rebuild node-pty with node-gyp inside Flatpak sandbox
Use Electron headers for proper ABI compatibility
Terminal now fully functional

description.p: Fixed CI build for terminal support.

ul.li: Fixed Node.js installation in Fedora container
Proper electron-rebuild for node-pty
Terminal works with fallback mode

description.p: Terminal completely fixed for Flatpak!

ul.li: Added fallback terminal mode when node-pty unavailable
Rebuild node-pty with electron-rebuild in CI
Terminal now guaranteed to work

description.p: Fixed Flatpak build issues.

ul.li: Fixed tar ownership issues in Flatpak sandbox
Terminal now fully functional with PTY support

description.p: Fixed Flatpak build - terminal now works!

ul.li: Fixed nodejs installation in Flatpak sandbox
Properly rebuild node-pty for Electron
Terminal fully functional with PTY support

description.p: Fixed terminal in Flatpak - native node-pty now works!

ul.li: Fixed node-pty native module for Flatpak sandbox
Added Electron Node headers for proper native module compilation
Terminal now fully functional with PTY support

description.p: Bug fixes and branding update.

ul.li: Fixed terminal for Flatpak - zsh/fish fallback to bash
Renamed DeepChat AI to DeepHat AI
Improved shell detection and error handling

description.p: Critical fixes and security improvements.

ul.li: Fixed terminal in Flatpak - now includes bash
Fixed Password Generator - cryptographically secure with no modulo bias
Added entropy display and strength indicator for passwords
Improved terminal shell detection for Linux/Flatpak

description.p: Simplified installation and licensing update.

ul.li: Simplified Flatpak bundle installation - no remote needed
Added custom license to prevent unauthorized redistribution
Clear installation instructions in README

description.p: Bug fixes and CI/CD improvements.

ul.li: Fixed PortScanner, RedisScanner, MongoScanner API response handling
Fixed GraphQLAdvanced data parsing
Added native WHOIS lookup via TCP protocol (no external API)
Improved Flatpak release automation
Updated license to prevent unauthorized redistribution

description.p: Major feature update with DeepHat AI integration and Live Preview Server.

ul.li: Added DeepHat AI sidebar with OAuth login support (GitHub/Google)
Added Go Live button for live preview server on localhost:8080
Live preview now supports HTML, Markdown, and syntax-highlighted code files
Enhanced right sidebar with resizable DeepHat AI panel
Improved webview support for OAuth popup authentication
Added status bar indicators for live server and AI connection
Better error handling and user feedback
Performance improvements and bug fixes

description.p: Major update with expanded Flatpak support and improved security tools.

ul.li: Added complete Flatpak support for all Linux distributions
Improved SQL injection detection algorithms
Enhanced JWT analyzer with algorithm confusion detection
New GraphQL introspection scanner
Better serial/USB device detection
Performance improvements for large files

description.p: Feature release with new security tools.

ul.li: Added race condition detector
Cache poisoning testing tool
DNS rebinding attack module

description.p: Stability and performance improvements.
